William Jackson, 916-856-4163 Plaintiff in Pro Per (appears late on Zoom after ruling is made and Defense counsel has left)
Erin Muniga, Esq. 415-421-3100 Gordon-Creed, Kelley, Holl & Sugarman for Defendant PG & E.

THE PARTY STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTY AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM JACKSON's Motion To Quash Subpoenaed Records.

Denied. Insufficient notice. Ms. Muniga to submit a proposed form of order in word format directly to the JPT nrosenquest@earthlink.net. ***

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

***The matter is recalled at 9:45am after the ruling and Defense' Counsel has left. Plaintiff Mr. Jackson was not present at the first calling of the case. JPT Rosenquest informs the Defendant ruling on the motion and that the ruling would not change even if Plaintiff appeared on time.***
